title: Head stays cool
review_text: Best hot-weather running cap I've owned. Laser-cut ventilation holes actually work. Crushed it into my vest pocket for 10 miles then put it on when the sun came out.

title: Buckle digs a little
review_text: The adjustable buckle in back digs into my head slightly when I wear sunglasses. Cap itself is excellent — light, breathable, great sun protection. Sweatband works well.
